items.title: Consult & Analyze
items.description: We dig deep to understand your problems and goals, then craft the optimal strategy before writing a single line of code.

items.title: Design & Plan
items.description: Wireframes, UX/UI design, and system architecture — all planned and approved before development begins.

items.title: Develop
items.description: Built with modern tech stacks, clean code, and weekly progress reports so you always know where we stand.

items.title: Test & QA
items.description: Every feature tested for performance, security, and UX — meeting international standards before deployment.

items.title: Deploy & Support
items.description: Production deployment with documentation and team training, plus ongoing maintenance and technical support.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive software development and IT solutions for modern enterprises

items.title: Web Application Development
items.description: Turn your business ideas into reality with scalable, fast, and secure web applications — built to international standards.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.description: Deliver smooth mobile experiences to your customers on iOS and Android, using Native or Cross-platform — whichever fits best.

items.title: Custom Software & ERP
items.description: Speed up and simplify your operations with custom software and ERP systems designed around your actual workflows.

items.title: System Integration
items.description: Connect fragmented systems seamlessly, eliminate duplicate data entry, and save your team's time across the organization.

items.title: Cloud Solutions
items.description: Move your systems to the cloud for flexibility, reliability, and long-term cost savings — across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

items.title: Maintenance & Support
items.description: Keep your software running smoothly 24/7. Our technical team responds quickly to issues and keeps your tech stack up-to-date.

story.title: About Us
paragraphs: KNT Technology Co., Ltd. is an enterprise technology partner specializing in Cloud Infrastructure, ERP Integration, AI Automation, and Enterprise Software Development.
We help organizations modernize legacy systems, improve operational efficiency, and accelerate digital transformation through scalable and highly secure technology solutions.
Our expertise spans Enterprise Architecture, cloud technologies, Business Process Automation, and System Integration across diverse industries.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: To deliver technology solutions that improve operational efficiency, modernize legacy systems, and create measurable business outcomes for organizations.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: To become a trusted technology partner for organizations across Thailand and Southeast Asia by delivering scalable software and digital solutions that drive long-term business value.

items.title: Operational Excellence
items.description: We never compromise on the standard of our work.

items.title: Continuous Innovation
items.description: We constantly learn and apply emerging technologies.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: Clear communication and honest progress reports at every step.
